seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well."
new_constraint: Start the email with an apology or an expression of regret.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Ensure the email begins with the phrase "I hope this message finds you well." Start the email with an apology or an expression of regret.
response:
<|channel>thought
Software developer.
Request a product demo.

        1.  Must begin with "I hope this message finds you well."
        2.  Must start the email with an apology or expression of regret (immediately following the opening phrase).

    *   *Opening:* I hope this message finds you well.
    *   *Apology:* I apologize for reaching out out of the blue / I'm sorry for the unsolicited email.
    *   *Context:* I've been following your work/product.
    *   *Request:* I'd like to see a demo of [Product Name].
    *   *Call to Action:* When are you available?

    *   *Subject Line:* Request for Product Demo - [My Company/Project Name]
    *   *Body:*
        I hope this message finds you well. I apologize for reaching out to you unexpectedly, but I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very impressed with the features you've implemented so far.

        I am interested in learning more about how [Product Name] could integrate with our current workflow. Would you be available for a brief product demo sometime next week? I’d love to see a walkthrough of the [specific feature, e.g., API integration/dashboard] and discuss how it might fit our needs.

        Please let me know your availability, or if there is a specific link I should use to book a time.

        Best regards,
        [My Name]

    *   Starts with "I hope this message finds you well."? Yes.
    *   Starts with an apology/regret? Yes ("I apologize for reaching out...").
    *   Asks for a demo? Yes.
    *   Targeted at a software developer? Yes.<channel|>Subject: Request for Product Demo: [Product Name]

I hope this message finds you well. I apologize for reaching out to you out of the blue, but I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very impressed with the technical architecture and features you have built so far.

I am interested in learning more about how your software could potentially streamline our current workflow, specifically regarding [mention a specific feature, e.g., the API integration or the automated reporting tool]. 

Would you be available for a brief product demo sometime next week? I would love to see a walkthrough of the platform and ask a few technical questions about its scalability.

Please let me know if you have a preferred time or a booking link I can use to schedule a call.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
[Your Company]<turn|>
